dashboard.name: bc5152e7-9042-469b-a6bb-d599d530f7db
dashboard.description: This dashboard provides a consolidated view of Google Threat Intelligence Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) and their relationships with security events across multiple data sources. It enables visualization and correlation of threat intelligence with observed activity, helping analysts quickly identify patterns and validate threats.

dashboardCharts.name: 7870174c-c02a-42f6-9c8c-060d0999cdcd
dashboardCharts.description: Shows the geographic source of the most frequent IOC matches within the specified global time filter.  Google SecOps enriches events containing external IP addresses with geolocation data. This provides additional context during an investigation.

markdown.content:
## GTI Correlation Overview ![alt text](https://files.readme.io/2bd0d6e09e34d1a8075ca7c9fb7a1ff76a11f2636cef55fbcdc89017121f9724-gti-favicon-colored.svg)
---	

#### The Correlation Overview dashboard is designed to identify relationships between Google Threat Intelligence's IOCs and events from other sources.

**IOC Match Visibility**: Monitor IOCs matched in your environment

dashboardCharts.name: 446b14ec-0c65-4893-a3a0-12f0e9503167
dashboardCharts.displayName: Number of IOC Matches By Severity
dashboardCharts.description: Displays number of IOC matches that have matched over time within the specified global time filter.

dashboardCharts.name: 030e8e09-2d45-4e16-a7fb-664eda391d4f
dashboardCharts.description: Displays the top 10 IOC values with the lowest match frequency within the selected global time filter. This view helps SOC teams identify uncommon or newly observed indicators that may represent emerging threats.

query.query:
(
    ${ioc_type} = "IOC_TYPE_DOMAIN"
    and (target.hostname=${ioc_val} OR network.dns.questions.name=${ioc_val})
)
OR
(
    ${ioc_type} = "IOC_TYPE_IP"
    and (target.ip = ${ioc_val} OR network.dns.answers.data = ${ioc_val})
)
OR
(
    ${ioc_type} = "IOC_TYPE_FILE_HASH_MD5"
    and (principal.file.md5 = ${ioc_val} OR principal.process.file.md5 = ${ioc_val} OR target.file.md5 = ${ioc_val} OR target.process.file.md5 = ${ioc_val} OR security_result.about.file.md5 = ${ioc_val} OR src.file.md5 = ${ioc_val} OR src.process.file.md5 = ${ioc_val})
)
OR
(
    ${ioc_type} = "IOC_TYPE_FILE_HASH_SHA256"
    and (principal.file.sha256 = ${ioc_val} OR principal.process.file.sha256 = ${ioc_val} OR target.file.sha256 = ${ioc_val} OR target.process.file.sha256 = ${ioc_val} OR security_result.about.file.sha256 = ${ioc_val} OR src.file.sha256 = ${ioc_val} OR src.process.file.sha256 = ${ioc_val})
)
OR
(
    ${ioc_type} = "IOC_TYPE_FILE_HASH_SHA1"
    and (principal.file.sha1 = ${ioc_val} OR principal.process.file.sha1 = ${ioc_val} OR target.file.sha1 = ${ioc_val} OR target.process.file.sha1 = ${ioc_val} OR security_result.about.file.sha1 = ${ioc_val} OR src.file.sha1 = ${ioc_val} OR src.process.file.sha1 = ${ioc_val})
)

dashboardCharts.name: d43662d1-7027-4b45-a6a7-7aac4b13b242
dashboardCharts.displayName: IOC Matches Over Time By Severity
dashboardCharts.description: Displays number of IOC matches that have matched over time within the specified global time filter.

dashboardCharts.name: b174f55e-0f57-4f0e-b2c1-5e07c6a73e59
dashboardCharts.description: Lists the top 10 IOCs that repeatedly appear in IOC matches within the specified global time filter. This helps SOC teams identify persistent attackers.

dashboardCharts.name: b79c9869-f08a-434b-aa13-b3d5f232fad6
dashboardCharts.description: Displays number of unique Google Threat Intelligence IOCs that were matched in the environment within the specified global time filter.

dashboardCharts.name: 232f1d7e-f862-4eff-bb2d-a4948ba62c32
dashboardCharts.displayName: Number of IOC Matches by IOC Type
dashboardCharts.description: Displays the number of IOC Matches for each IOC type within the specified global time filter.

dashboardQueries.name: fcdc3354-448b-4a4d-97f3-928ec40a1ef5
dashboardQueries.query:
ioc.feed_log_type = "GCP_THREATINTEL"
ioc.feed_name = "Google Threat Intelligence"
$ioc_val = ioc.ioc_value
$ioc_type = ioc.ioc_type
$latitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.latitude
$longitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.longitude 
$country = if(ioc.location.country_or_region != "", ioc.location.country_or_region, "-") 
$match_bucket = timestamp.get_date(ioc.day_bucket_seconds) 
match: 
    $ioc_type
outcome: 
    $count = count_distinct(strings.concat($ioc_val, "|", $ioc_type, "|", $match_bucket, "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($latitude * 1000000)), "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($longitude * 1000000)), "|", $country))
order: 
    $count desc 
limit: 
    10

dashboardQueries.name: f78dcefd-638b-4ada-aecb-6f5e882bed47
dashboardQueries.query:
ioc.feed_log_type = "GCP_THREATINTEL"
ioc.feed_name = "Google Threat Intelligence"
$ioc = ioc.ioc_value 
$ioc_type = ioc.ioc_type 
$match_bucket = timestamp.get_date(ioc.day_bucket_seconds) 
$latitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.latitude
$longitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.longitude
ioc.location.country_or_region != ""
$country = if(ioc.location.country_or_region != "", ioc.location.country_or_region, "-") 
match:
    $country
outcome:
    $count = count_distinct(strings.concat($ioc, "|", $ioc_type, "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($latitude * 1000000)), "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($longitude * 1000000)), "|", $country, $match_bucket))
    $max_latitude = max(ioc.location.region_coordinates.latitude)
    $max_longitude = max(ioc.location.region_coordinates.longitude)
order:
    $count desc
limit:
    10000

dashboardQueries.name: 255bc0c4-9ef3-4dbb-a00f-adf363c6d2d0
5beaa2b6-ce67-4707-93e6-8ea058d940c6
dashboardQueries.query:
ioc.feed_log_type = "GCP_THREATINTEL"
ioc.feed_name = "Google Threat Intelligence"
$ioc_val = ioc.ioc_value
$ioc_type = ioc.ioc_type
$latitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.latitude
$longitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.longitude 
$country = if(ioc.location.country_or_region != "", ioc.location.country_or_region, "-") 
$classification = ioc.category
$match_bucket = timestamp.get_date(ioc.day_bucket_seconds) 
$severity = strings.to_upper(ioc.severity)
match: 
    $severity
outcome: 
    $count = count_distinct(strings.concat($ioc_val, "|", $ioc_type, "|", $match_bucket, "|" cast.as_string(cast.as_int($latitude * 1000000)), "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($longitude * 1000000)), "|", $country))
order: 
    $count desc
limit:
    10

dashboardQueries.name: b417f59f-0658-4d65-be85-c012fe914176
f1060cfc-b9d4-4493-a57d-619b4044b21d
e9e7e858-c6f9-44c1-9d5a-6c31e042d156
dashboardQueries.query:
ioc.feed_log_type = "GCP_THREATINTEL"
ioc.feed_name = "Google Threat Intelligence"
$ioc_val = ioc.ioc_value
$match_bucket=timestamp.get_date(ioc.day_bucket_seconds)
$severity = strings.to_upper(ioc.severity)
$latitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.latitude
$longitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.longitude 
$country = if(ioc.location.country_or_region != "", ioc.location.country_or_region, "-") 
match:
    $match_bucket, $severity
outcome:
    $count = count_distinct(strings.concat($ioc_val, "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($latitude * 1000000)), "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($longitude * 1000000)), "|", $country))
limit:
    10000

dashboardQueries.name: 527b268a-d1cb-4d13-b375-1bd320acdb44
dashboardQueries.query:
ioc.feed_log_type = "GCP_THREATINTEL"
ioc.feed_name = "Google Threat Intelligence"
$ioc_val = ioc.ioc_value 
$ioc_type = ioc.ioc_type
$latitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.latitude
$longitude = ioc.location.region_coordinates.longitude 
$country = if(ioc.location.country_or_region != "", ioc.location.country_or_region, "-") 
outcome:
    $ioc_count = count_distinct(strings.concat($ioc_val, "|", $ioc_type, "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($latitude * 1000000)), "|", cast.as_string(cast.as_int($longitude * 1000000)), "|", $country))
